title: Quarterly metrics review landed ahead of schedule
body: The growth team wrapped the quarterly metrics review a week early after consolidating dashboards and aligning event naming across mobile and web.

title: Design system tokens are now flowing into native builds
body: The platform team finished the first pass of design token distribution for iOS, Android, and web.

title: Support workflow test reduced triage time by 22 percent
body: A new intake flow for customer escalations reduced average triage time and improved first response consistency.

title: Mobile experimentation guardrails are ready for rollout
body: Release engineering added experiment guardrails so new mobile flags must declare blast radius and expiration.

title: Onboarding checklists now adapt to the engineer role
body: People operations launched role-aware onboarding checklists for backend, mobile, frontend, and product engineering.

title: Incident retros now publish action owners automatically
body: The internal tooling team added a step to incident retros that extracts action items into a tracked follow-up board.

title: Checkout performance budget reduced p95 latency
body: The commerce team introduced a stricter performance budget and reduced p95 checkout latency across major regions.

title: Experiment analytics naming now enforces lint rules
body: Analytics event names now pass a lint rule in CI, preventing malformed metric keys before they hit production.

title: Internal docs portal shipped AI-assisted search
body: Developer experience launched semantic search for internal docs with source snippets and ownership metadata.

title: Accessibility review found and fixed modal focus traps
body: Accessibility review identified focus-loop issues in modal flows and shipped keyboard-safe defaults.

title: Feature flags now include automatic expiry reminders
body: Feature management now sends weekly expiry reminders to flag owners and escalates stale flags.

title: Release checklist gains preflight API contract checks
body: The release checklist now includes automated API contract checks to catch schema drift before deployment.

title: Crash triage rotation reduced mean time to acknowledgment
body: A rotating triage schedule for mobile crashes reduced acknowledgment time for high-severity issues.

title: Data retention report now auto-publishes weekly summary
body: Compliance automation now publishes a weekly retention summary with exceptions and remediation owners.

title: Mobile release notes pipeline supports localized drafts
body: Release tooling now supports localized release-note drafts and approval status per language.
